message:
feat(beads): add MRPreVerification fields to MRFields (gt-lu84)

Add pre_verified, pre_verified_at, and pre_verified_base fields to MRFields
for Phase 3 polecat pre-verification. These allow polecats to signal that
they've rebased onto the target and run the full gate suite, enabling the
refinery to fast-path merge without re-running gates.
